name: io.github.agentmark-ai/mcp-server
description: Inspect local agentmark dev traces and drive AgentMark Cloud — apps, metrics, experiments, deployments — via tools auto-generated from the gateway OpenAPI.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTMARK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: App-scoped API key for CI/automation. Optional — you can instead authenticate with the session bearer written by `agentmark login`.
